records.stderr_pattern: error during connect|Cannot connect to the Docker daemon|Is the docker daemon running
records.description: Docker daemon not responding — retry after brief wait

records.stderr_pattern: Client\.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers|request canceled while waiting for connection
records.description: Docker registry HTTP timeout — increase client timeout and retry

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: Get https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/: net/http: request canceled while waiting for connection (Client.Timeout exceeded while awaiting headers)" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: dial tcp.*lookup.*server misbehaving|dial tcp.*lookup.*no such host
records.description: Docker DNS resolution failure — set alternative DNS and retry

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "Error response from daemon: Get https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/node/manifests/18: dial tcp: lookup registry-1.docker.io on 127.0.0.53:53: server misbehaving" >&2; exit 1'
